summary: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2.1.0 closed-loop automation: hard pre-response hook block metadata, hook-side auto sync after preflight completion, finish_task auto-growth records, policy-based auto_sync commit/push tool, search_memory alias, installer env wiring for auto growth/sync, current Codex config/hook env update, and flow audit verification showing all 8 user-flow steps verified.
decisions: Add auto_sync as a separate policy-enforced tool instead of changing git_sync dry-run semantics.
Enable auto growth and auto sync by installer/env configuration, while blocked raw conversation and secret-bearing paths remain excluded from automatic commits.
Move hook auto_sync after codex_preflight_completed event so the preflight completion event is included in the auto-sync commit.
next_steps: Fully quit/restart Codex so the already-running app reloads the updated user hook and MCP env.
Check GitHub Actions release run for tag v2.1.0 if release asset availability must be confirmed from GitHub UI.
